mapper.insert: insert into sys_logininfor (user_name, unit_id, status, ipaddr, login_location, browser, os, msg, login_time) values (#{userName},#{unitId}, #{status}, #{ipaddr}, #{loginLocation}, #{browser}, #{os}, #{msg}, sysdate())
mapper.select: SELECT date_dim.day as day, COALESCE(COUNT(DISTINCT sli.info_id), 0) as total_count FROM ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 6 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 4 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 3 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY) as day UNION ALL SELECT CURDATE() as day ) date_dim LEFT JOIN sys_logininfor sli ON DATE_FORMAT(sli.login_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = date_dim.day AND sli.unit_id = #{unitId} AND sli.login_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 7 DAY) AND sli.msg = '登录成功' GROUP BY date_dim.day
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_logininfor where info_id in
#{infoId}
